boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP execute payment/vendor action? Focus: existing rail belongs to parent vendor, not requested vendor.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match on vendor-rail ownership.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Vendor entity must match rail owner remains open.

final_answer: Source records show unresolved dependency on vendor-rail ownership match for the requested action. Control record ties match requirement directly to execution boundary. Policy requires closed boundary before ALLOW. Anomaly notes and fallback context do not override. Escalate for resolution of exact vendor entity alignment.
open_blockers: vendor entity must match rail owner
